title: Game Timer
description: Add a timer that indicates hoe much time you spent in the world.
body:
![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48a1954f14e2e1d4816014bddff2f6e705d10158.png) **Playtime HUD** is a **server-side** Data Pack / Mod that adds a timer that indicates how much time a player spent on the world. ![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef0f4bbec1f0b48f7f2e33de4a218f9d4fa474f4.png) ![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5da0442fcc8f2d77453f4c79a2bfcb0c84b1c0fc.png)
Functions
  • /function diesse:timer/reset_timer: Reset the timer;
  • /trigger pause: Stop the timer;
  • /trigger resume: Resume the timer;
This mechanic is used in minigames like **Bedwars**, **ManHunt**, **SkyWars**... It can be also used to **Speedrun** the game and see the timer in the whiletime.
